title: AI Model Comparison Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Comparison Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml

<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
  <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#F5F5F5' opacity='0.9'/>
  <rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='240' rx='10' fill='#E5E5E5'/>
  <text x='20' y='90' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>AI Model Comparison</text>
  <rect x='30' y='120' width='250' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD' opacity='0.9'/>
  <rect x='50' y='150' width='200' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='40' y='180' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Search Models</text>
  <rect x='30' y='220' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect x='340' y='120' width='50' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD' opacity='0.9'/>
  <text x='350' y='150' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Compare</text>
  <rect x='350' y='180' width='50' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect x='30' y='220' width='350' height='60' rx='10' fill='#E5E5E5'/>
  <rect x='50' y='250' width='100' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='60' y='280' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Select Models</text>
  <rect x='20' y='280' width='30' height='30' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='70' y='280' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Metrics</text>
  <rect x='350' y='220' width='50' height='60' rx='10' fill='#E5E5E5'/>
  <text x='360' y='250' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Chart</text>
  <rect x='20' y='220' width='330' height='60' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect x='20' y='250' width='300' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD' opacity='0.9'/>
  <rect x='30' y='280' width='270' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
</svg>

```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: The playground must display up to 5 AI models with their corresponding performance metrics.
The model selection dropdown must be enabled and allow users to select up to 3 models for comparison.
The comparison chart must display key metrics for each selected model, including accuracy, precision, and recall.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Comparison Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, model selection dropdown, and comparison chart functionality.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
